rationale: Educ. Code §49.012 governs timing of school district elections for voter approval of agreements. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: An election under this chapter for voter approval of an agreement entered by the board of trustees shall be held on a Tuesday or Saturday not more than 45 days after the date of the agreement.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this election-timing provision.
